checks.finding: All AC-NNN identifiers referenced in tasks.md (AC-001..AC-017 across T-001..T-007 Done When and Scope items) resolve to matching entries in acceptance-tests.md's AC table. No dangling AC IDs found.
All 8 tasks use the literal value 'None' under their '### Blockers' section. precheck-result.json records blockers_format_valid: true, consistent with this observation.
All REQ-001..REQ-011 appear in at least one task's Requirements: field. No uncovered requirements.
All AC-001..AC-017 are traceable to a task via explicit AC-NNN references in Done When / Scope items (AC-017 split across T-001 and T-004, matching traceability.md). No uncovered acceptance criteria.
Every task T-001..T-008 has a non-empty Requirements: field citing at least one REQ-NNN. No orphan tasks.
Only T-007 matches the test-task title trigger (contains 'mcp-tests'); its Done When explicitly references AC-006 and AC-010, so it is not orphaned.
Attempt 1 round 1. All 8 tasks show 'Approval: Draft' and 'Status: Planned'. No deviations.

T-008 declares 'Risk: low' with 'Required Workflow: acceptance-first'. The risk-gate-matrix requires low -> test-after. This is a mismatch per the check's explicit pairing rule. The task's own Risk Rationale acknowledges the deviation (chosen to avoid the task-review-precheck file-level grep false positive with medium tasks), but the check text provides no waiver authority for choosing a stricter-than-required workflow, and precheck's workflow_match_precheck only guards the forbidden medium+test-after combination — it does not check or excuse low+acceptance-first. All other tasks (T-001..T-005 high/tdd; T-006/T-007 medium/acceptance-first) match the matrix correctly.

AC-017 is the only AC referenced by two tasks (T-001 too-large/not-sdd-root; T-004 not-found), with Done When annotations explicitly differentiating the sub-scopes and traceability.md confirming the intentional split. No other cross-task duplicates.
All 8 tasks declare Blockers: None; dependency-graph.json confirms edges: [] with nodes T-001..T-008. Vacuously satisfied.
BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS, so this check runs. dependency-graph.json shows no edges, so no cycle is possible. No cycle detected.

T-001/T-003/T-004/T-007 each bundle multiple sub-components joined by '+', but in each case they are tightly-coupled parts of one architectural layer rather than two unrelated feature concerns. T-002 and T-006 fit the explicit exception patterns (impl+directly-tied test; paired install/uninstall). No task combines two disconnected business features.

No Done When item uses a forbidden vague verb/phrase. Each AC-tagged item names a concrete observable outcome. Non-documentation tasks include Red->Green evidence and provenance-bearing evidence bundle as concrete verification artifacts. T-008 names the exact file (USERGUIDE.md) and specific required content as its completion proof.

Task IDs T-001..T-008 all have corresponding entries in traceability.md's REQ->Task and AC->TEST->Task tables. REQ-001..REQ-011 in traceability.md all exist in requirements.md. No dangling references either direction within the manifest-scoped artifacts.
